themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "So all the elders of Israel came to the king to Hebron; and king David made a league with the...". Word-study detail reinforces "מָ֑יִם: of waters - water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen".

themes.label: Salvation
themes.summary: This chapter speaks of rescue, deliverance, redemption, life, or being saved. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "And David enquired of the LORD, saying, Shall I go up to the Philistines? wilt thou deliver t...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶתֵּ֛ן: deliver - to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)".
